sqlite.query: SELECT 'user' AS role, json_extract(value, '$.conversationId') AS session_id, datetime(json_extract(value, '$.createdAt')/1000, 'unixepoch') AS timestamp, json_extract(value, '$.text') AS content, json_extract(value, '$.modelInfo.modelName') AS model, json_extract(value, '$.tokenCount.inputTokens') AS input_tokens, json_extract(value, '$.tokenCount.outputTokens') AS output_tokens FROM cursorDiskKV WHERE key LIKE 'bubbleId:%' AND json_extract(value, '$.createdAt') > (strftime('%s','now') - 3024000) * 1000 ORDER BY json_extract(value, '$.createdAt') ASC
